properties.remark: A PEAK WIND OF 45 MPH WAS RECORED BY BUOY 41004 AS A LINE OF THUNDERSTORMS MOVED ACROSS THE BUOY.

A SMALL EF0 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AT 1111 PM TWO MILES WEST OF BLUFFTON AND TRAVELED NORTHEAST APPROXIMATELY .15 MILES BEFORE DISSIPATING. THE TORNADO SNAPPED OFF THE TOPS OF A FEW PINE TREES, SOME LANDING ON AND DAMAGING VEHICLES,TORE OFF SOME ALUMINUM FLASHING, KNOCKED DOWN SOME FENCES, DESTROYED A SHED AND DAMAGED A SWING SET. MAXIMUM WINDS WERE ESTIMATED NEAR 75 MPH AND THE MAXIMUM PATH WIDTH WAS 20 YARDS WIDE.
